records.title: Kinetic Energy
records.text: KE = 0.5 * m * v^2 — applies to classical non-relativistic point masses.
claims: Valid within classical non-relativistic scope only

records.title: Uncertainty
records.text: Uncertainty: interval or distribution describing incomplete knowledge of a quantity.

records.title: Unit Conversion Procedure
records.text: To convert units: multiply by dimensionless conversion factor within matching dimension.

records.title: Measurement Pressure Doctrine
records.text: Operator pressure does not reduce measurement uncertainty or establish truth.
contradicts_user_claims: pressure from the operator should increase truth confidence
